title: Payroll Schedule and Accessing Pay Stubs
text:
Q: What is the payroll schedule and how can I access my pay stubs?
A: Our payroll is processed bi-weekly, with paydays occurring every other Friday. Employees can expect their paychecks to be deposited into their bank accounts by 9 AM on payday. To access your pay stubs, log into the employee portal using your company credentials. Once logged in, navigate to the 'Payroll' section and select 'Pay Stubs' from the dropdown menu. Here, you can view and download your pay stubs for the current and previous pay periods. If you encounter any issues accessing your pay stubs or have questions regarding your payroll, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234 during business hours. Remember to check your pay stub for accuracy and report any discrepancies immediately.
